ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "discount" TEXT /* Discount applied to the product */,
  "product_category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the product */,
  "product_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale transaction */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product sold */,
  "sold_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sale_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the sale */,
  "sale_status" TEXT /* Status of the sale transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_channels" (
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales channel */,
  "channel_name" TEXT /* Name of the sales channel */,
  "channel_type" TEXT /* Type of sales channel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "channel_sales" (
  "channel_sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each channel sale record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product sold */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales channel */,
  "sold_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity sold through the channel */,
  "channel_sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the channel sale */,
  "channel_sale_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the channel sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("channel_sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_channel_sales_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_channel_sales_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES sales_channels ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "stock_level" INTEGER /* Current stock level of the product */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Reorder quantity for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "customer_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "customer_address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_sales" (
  "customer_sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer sale record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer making the purchase */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sale transaction */,
  "customer_sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the customer sale */,
  "customer_sale_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the customer sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_sales_sale_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_id") REFERENCES sales ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being promoted */,
  "promotion_description" TEXT /* Description of the promotion */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "promotion_type" TEXT /* Type of promotion */,
  "promotion_code" TEXT /* Promotion code for the promotion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotions_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the system */,
  "user_password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "user_permissions" TEXT /* Permissions for the user role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each sale transaction
Unique identifier for each sales channel
Unique identifier for each channel sale record
Total amount of the channel sale
Unique identifier for each inventory record
Current stock level of the product
Unique identifier for each customer sale record
ID of the customer making the purchase
Total amount of the customer sale
ID of the product being promoted
Role of the user in the system
